queries.question: Show textbooks and e-books published by someone with phone number 1234567890.
queries.sql:
SELECT EducationalMaterials.Title 
FROM EducationalMaterials JOIN Publishers ON EducationalMaterials.PublisherID = Publishers.PublisherID
WHERE (EducationalMaterials.Type = "Textbook" OR EducationalMaterials.Type = "E-Book") AND Publishers.PhoneNumber = "1234567890"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?educationalmaterials a :EducationalMaterials .
  ?publishers a :Publishers .
  ?educationalmaterials p:hasPublishers ?publishers .
  ?educationalmaterials p:Title ?title .
  ?educationalmaterials p:Type ?type_w .
  ?educationalmaterials p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?publishers p:PhoneNumber ?phonenumber_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Textbook" || STR(?type_w2) = "E-Book")) && (STR(?phonenumber_w) = "1234567890" || STR(?phonenumber_w) = "1234567890.0")))
}
